topic: A barista preparing a traditional Turkish coffee using a cezve in hot sand.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: The barista lowers the cezve into hot sand, front view.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: The barista stirs the coffee in the cezve, foam forming, close-up.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: The barista lifts the cezve from the sand and pours into a cup, side-angle.
parsed_generation.narration: A focused barista buries the cezve in hot sand and begins heating. He stirs until foam forms, then lifts and pours the coffee.

feedback: The sequence stays on topic and uses timestamped, cinematic shots, but it diverges from the gold standard by not depicting the sand bed movement or foam rising in a controlled boil-off moment, and it uses an extra shot instead of the original two-shot structure. To improve alignment, adjust the visuals to emphasize heating in hot sand (circling or bedding) and the foam crest before pouring, and consider consolidating into two tightly defined shots. Increase sensory detail (sand texture, copper cezve, steam) and incorporate a more decisive boil-over cue before the pour.
strengths: Clear topic focus with cezve in hot sand and distinct shot angles
Concise, action-first narration that supports the visuals
fixes: Add explicit sand-bed heating motion (circling or bed movement) and foam-rise/boil-over cue
Consider reducing to two shots to mirror the gold standard cadence and strengthen dramatic progression
